item.title: Java

item.title: Memory Dump
item.description: binwalk Download binwalk # Extract files from memory dump binwalk -M -e memory.dmp Mini Dump pypykatz lsa minidump memory.dmp

item.title: Python Decompile
item.description: uncompyle6 # Install pip3 install uncompyle6 # Run (need .pyc extension) uncompyle6 script.pyc
